summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SilkZé Kanban production management system iteration 3. Excellent results with 100% backend success and 98% frontend success. CRITICAL FIX: Login error message now displays correctly. All major functionality working perfectly including httpOnly cookie auth, calculations, mobile responsiveness, and all 6 tabs.
passed_tests: Backend: All 11 API endpoints (login, auth, logout, CRUD, search, backup) - 100% success with httpOnly cookies
Frontend: Login with wrong password shows 'Senha incorreta' error message correctly - FIXED!
Frontend: Login with correct password 'silkze1990' using httpOnly cookies
Frontend: All 12 Kanban columns present (Orçamento, Aguardando, Aprovado, Malha, Corte, Silk, Costura, Conferência, Expedição, Finalizado, Erros, Arquivado)
Frontend: New pedido creation via '+Novo' button, card appears in correct column
Frontend: Slide-over sheet opens with all 6 tabs (Info, Orcamento, Grade, Check, Imagem, Layout)
Frontend: Tab navigation works perfectly for all 6 tabs
Frontend: Client info form filling (cliente, material, detalhes) with auto-save
Frontend: Orcamento calculations 100% accurate - 10x25=250, 5x30=150, subtotal=400, 10% discount=40, total=360, entrada=100, restante=260
Frontend: Grade tab - add rows, fill colors and sizes
Frontend: Checklist functionality - toggle items, progress bar updates correctly
Frontend: Status change via dropdown in sheet header
Frontend: Search functionality filters by client name
Frontend: Logout via logout button redirects to login page
Frontend: Mobile responsive at 375px width - header, buttons, horizontal scroll, full-width sheet
